rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports, and in implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts; avoid introducing package-qualified names not present in the model.
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Declare constants and equations using valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
Ensure type consistency between assumed types and actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid outputs.
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless explicitly defined in the model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
